scripts.build: bun run generate-migrations && bun run generate-integrations && cd client && bun run build
scripts.build:binary: bun run build && mv client/build . && bun run generate-client-embed && bun build --compile --compile-autoload-package-json --external pg-hstore --external pg server/index.js --outfile MySpeed
scripts.dev: bun run generate-migrations && bun run generate-integrations && bun run server & bun run client
